log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Mage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Satyr — Bardic Musician: SUCCESS. (had advantage) 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Bandit Captain's turn ---
Bandit Captain can't reach Satyr — Bardic Musician with Scimitar (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
--- Bandit's turn ---
Bandit can't reach Satyr — Bardic Musician with Scimitar (distance 25ft, range 5ft).
--- Bandit's turn ---
Bandit can't reach Satyr — Bardic Musician with Scimitar (distance 20ft, range 5ft).
--- Satyr — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:20+0=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Bandit: WIS save [d20:6+0=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/2 targets affected.
Bandit is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Satyr — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 35ft, range 5ft).
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Satyr — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 30ft, range 5ft).
--- Bandit's turn ---
Bandit can't reach Satyr — Bardic Musician with Scimitar (distance 15ft, range 5ft).

ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Satyr — Bardic Musician.
→ Satyr — Bardic Musician healed for 6 HP. HP: 37/67
Bandit is incapacitated — skipping turn.
